title: Zapier X Monday.com v2 Link Column Issue
excerpt:
Hi I am trying to update the link column in Monday.com with a link in an app I am trying to integrate. 
When I use the JSOM, I am getting an error. If I try the link by itself, I also get an error.Any help on this would …

posts.author: laharin (Lahari Neelapareddy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi I am trying to update the link column in Monday.com with a link in an app I am trying to integrate.

When I use the JSOM, I am getting an error. If I try the link by itself, I also get an error.Any help on this would be great! See screenshot below. What am I doing wrong?

image1403×1009 55.7 KB

posts.author: mitchell.hudson (Mitchell hudson)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @laharin,

Welcome to the community!

By the first look, it seems that you are missing part of the input required to update the link column. You also need to provide a url value.

"{\"url\":\"http://monday.com\",\"text\":\"go to monday!\"}" Something like this.
